subject: A Kor warrior with pale hair raises a glowing orb aloft while a group of armed allies stands behind in a dark, fog-filled environment dominated by massive looming presences
description: A central figure with pale hair stands in the foreground, one arm raised high holding a glowing spherical light source. The figure wears layered armor and carries a curved blade at their side. Behind and flanking them, several other armored figures are visible holding spears and weapons. The environment is dark and heavily fogged with a green-amber haze; enormous shadowy masses loom in the background suggesting either large creatures or corrupted terrain. The scene has a rallying quality — the raised light as a signal or beacon amid darkness. The group is clearly facing a threat beyond the frame.
foreground: Pale-haired warrior raising glowing orb with group of spear-bearers behind
background: Dark foggy environment with looming shadowy masses
emotion: rallying defiance — the central figure is calling others forward against overwhelming darkness
